dct_description_sm: Coordinates approximate and based on Greenwich meridian.
Plan of Alger city shows city districts, port facilities and fortifications, important buildings, railways, roads and streets, transportation lines, vegetation, and public service places.
Relief shown by hachures and landform drawings.
Oriented with north toward lower right.
Includes index: "Monuments, etc...", "Edifices Religieux", "Transports", "Etablissements Financiers", "Enseignement", and "Hôtels Principaux".
